wiki.summary: “STFU” is the ninth track off A$AP Rocky’s fourth studio album Don’t Be Dumb, the song features American group Slay Squad. This track was first teased in the beginning of the “PUNK ROCKY” music video for the first 42 seconds. Throughout the song, he addresses rumors, distractions, and people attempting to insert themselves into his personal or professional life. The repeated phrase “Shut the fuck up” functions as a direct response to that noise. Read more on Last.fm.
